allow: Bash(PGPASSWORD=app_password psql -h localhost -p 5434 -U app_user -d translog -c 'SELECT "tenantId", slug, version, "isActive", "updatedAt" FROM document_templates WHERE slug=\('"'"'packing-list-a4'"'"'\) ORDER BY "tenantId" NULLS FIRST, version;')
